schema.notes: hierarchyChild + parent extend the CLAUDE.md schema for rollup drilldowns (mtd/, ytd/, discounts/). Parent path is relative to repo root.

categories.title: Operations
categories.description: Daily coordination, system status, agent activity. The 'what's happening right now' pages.

categories.title: KPI & Period Reporting
categories.description: Period-anchored business performance — month-to-date, year-to-date, monthly summaries.

categories.title: Marketing & Ads
categories.description: Ad performance, creatives, attribution, customer LTV, campaign analytics.

categories.title: Catalog & Data
categories.description: Product catalog browsing, database/schema reference, data archive.

categories.title: Active Projects
categories.description: Project-specific dashboards. Auto-generated at hub build from clawd/data/projects/*.json where dashboardUrl is set AND status is not complete.

categories.title: Archive
categories.description: Stale or completed content moved out of the active hub.

pages.title: Mission Control
pages.description: Agent coordination, project tracking, and task management across the Teeccino guild.

pages.title: Automations Dashboard
pages.description: System status, script inventory, data pipeline architecture, and cron schedules.

pages.title: Ops Dashboard
pages.description: Technical pipeline ops view — data freshness, date coverage, database tables, matrix workbooks, recent commits.
hubsmithFlags: review: possible overlap with status.html — may merge or differentiate

external-resource: companion 'Shipping & Fulfillment Matrix.xlsx' on OneDrive (Marketing and eCommerce/Reporting/Matrices/) — broader than fulfillment.html, kept as ops-side reference

pages.description: Cohort LTV analysis — net revenue per customer over 24 months. Subscription split, channel split, per-cohort detail.

pages.description: Per-campaign daily budget vs spend. Google: full daily budget history, utilization, change events. Meta: spend.

pages.title: Fulfillment Time
pages.description: DTC days-to-ship SLA tracking — same-day and within-N-day rates, monthly trend, carrier and service breakdowns. Top of page is a rolling 30/90/365-day view; use the month-picker dropdown to drill into any archived calendar month (January 2024 onward).
